title: Workers' Compensation Loss Run — Universal Extraction Schema v5 (industry-standard)
description: Comprehensive schema synthesizing ACORD/NCCI/IAIABC/CMS standards + 50+ US carrier/TPA/PEO format observations + state-specific requirements (CA, NY, TX, FL, OR, CO, UT) + edge cases (CT, mental, OD, fatality, MSA, litigation, subrogation, reinsurance). v5 adds ~75 fields organized into themed groups. All v4 fields preserved (backward compat).

policy_year_lob_pivot.description: Pivot summary of metrics by Line of Business × policy period. Distinct from policies[] (which carries individual policy terms with claims) and from section_totals[] (which is rollup rows). Each row here is one LOB × period intersection from a printed pivot table. Example carriers: Hartford account summary, BlueCross multi-LOB reports.

line_of_business.description: Free text (preserved from source) — WORKERS COMP, FIRE & ALLIED, GENERAL LIAB, etc.

lob_code.description: Single-letter or short code (W, P, L) when carrier prints one.

policy_number.description: If pivot row is for a single policy, capture it. Null for multi-policy aggregates.

policy_period_label.description: Verbatim period label when not a clean date range, e.g. '2016-2020'.

is_total_row.description: True for 'PRIOR LOB TOTAL', 'ACCOUNT TOTAL', 'LATEST POLICY INFORMATION TOTAL' etc.

oneOf.description: The risk-management software platform that generated the report. Distinct from carrier and claims_administrator. Examples: Origami Risk (TriNet, Insperity), Riskonnect, Marsh ClearSight, Ventiv.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code. Defaults to USD for North American carriers; supports international.

ncci_carrier_id.description: NCCI Carrier Code (used in WCSTAT submissions).

business_segment_identifier.description: WCSTAT positions 106-112; not used in DE/MI/NC/NJ/NY/PA/WI.

oneOf.description: Excess WC / reinsurance / self-insured retention fields.

claim_number_history.description: Prior claim numbers from system migrations. Generalizes AmTrust 'converted_claim_number' (kept as alias) to support multi-system histories. Each entry preserves the source. Primary claim_number is the current system's number.

source_system.description: Name of the system this number came from (e.g. 'legacy ICM', 'AmTrust pre-2020').

raw_combined_cell.description: Verbatim combined-cell text when a carrier prints multiple semantic fields in one cell. Example (Hartford detail): 'Canoga Park Ca/Struck By Flying-falling Object - Not We /Office Manager'. REQUIRED for hybrid_detail archetype docs (Hartford detail, similar). Even when location/cause/occupation are individually parsed into their fields, this audit trail must be preserved when the source cell was visually combined.

date_of_injury_begin.description: CT claims: start of exposure window (CA LC §5500.5).

date_of_injury_end.description: CT claims: last injurious exposure date.

date_of_knowledge_industrial_causation.description: CA LC §5412 — when claimant knew injury was work-related.

date_first_exposure.description: Occupational disease: first known exposure to causative agent.

date_last_exposure.description: OD: last day of exposure before manifestation.

date_of_diagnosis.description: OD: when diagnosis was rendered (often = DOI per IAIABC convention for latency claims).

date_of_disability.description: First day unable to work (vs DOI which may be earlier).

mmi_date.description: Maximum Medical Improvement / Permanent and Stationary date.

original_closure_date.description: For reopened claims — when it was originally closed.

reopen_date.description: Date the claim was reopened (NY 18yr/8yr; IL 30mo windows).

nature_of_injury_prefix.description: Carrier-specific prefix extracted from the main value. ICW examples: 'Spc' (Specific), 'Occ' (Occupational), 'Mult' (Multiple). When extracted, the main nature_of_injury must NOT include the prefix (canonical = stripped). Example: PDF prints 'Spc: Strain'. Schema fills nature_of_injury='Strain', nature_of_injury_prefix='Spc'.

body_part_prefix.description: Body region grouping prefix. ICW examples: 'Trunk', 'Lower Ext', 'Upper Ext', 'Mult', 'Body Systems'. Same rule as nature_of_injury_prefix: extract + strip.

body_part_code.description: WCIO 2-digit Part of Body code (e.g., '11'=Brain, '34'=Hand, '41'=Lower Back, '54'=Knee). Pair with body_part text.

nature_of_injury_code.description: WCIO 2-digit Nature of Injury code (e.g., '04'=Burn, '13'=Cut, '30'=Sprain, '31'=Strain, '40'=Amputation, '49'=Hernia, '65'=Carpal Tunnel).

icd10_codes.description: ICD-10 diagnosis codes (Sedgwick, CorVel, CMS Section 111 reporting). Multi-value.

disease_icd10_code.description: Primary diagnosis for occupational disease (asbestosis, silicosis, hearing loss, COVID-19, etc.)

oneOf.description: Adjuster / claim examiner contact. Locked shape across carriers: all 5 fields are siblings (no nested .contact wrapper). When a carrier prints only name, leave others null.

category.description: AmTrust 'Adjuster Category' — examiner severity tier (Lite, Standard, Complex, etc.)

cross_references.description: Links to other claims (re-openings, multi-policy claims, related litigation). Replaces single-valued related_claim_number.

oneOf.description: Permanency / disability rating. State-specific schemes (CA scheduled, AMA Guides, TX IR).

disability_type_code.description: TTD=Temp Total, TPD=Temp Partial, PTD=Perm Total, PPD=Perm Partial, MED_ONLY.

pd_rating_pct.description: Permanent Disability rating (CA scheduled rating, decimal 0-1 or pct 0-100).

wpi_pct.description: Whole Person Impairment per AMA Guides 5th/6th Edition.

ama_guides_edition.description: Which AMA Guides edition was used.

schedule_loss_of_use_pct.description: NY-specific Schedule Loss of Use rating.

qme_ame_name.description: CA Qualified or Agreed Medical Evaluator who issued the rating.

oneOf.description: Litigation / appeals / settlement details. Distinct from status.in_litigation flag.

state_board_case_number.description: State workers' comp board case ID (NY WCB, FL OJCC, TX DWC, etc.).

settlement_type_code.description: C&R=Compromise & Release, STIP=Stipulated Award, FA=Findings & Award, SECTION_32=NY §32.

section_25a_indicator.description: NY §25-a Special Disability Fund / Reopened Case Fund.

oneOf.description: Third-party subrogation / lien details. Distinct from financials.recovery_subrogation amount.

deductible_reimbursement.description: Recovery from insured under large-deductible plans.

oneOf.description: CMS Section 111 / Medicare Set-Aside fields. Mandatory for §111 reportable claims.

msp_conditional_payment.description: MSP repayment to Medicare (conditional payment recovery).

oneOf.description: Treating physician + medical network + UR/IMR details.

mpn_id.description: CA DWC Medical Provider Network ID.

ur_decisions.description: Utilization Review decisions on treatment requests.

age_out_date.description: When child ages out (typically 18 or 23 if student).

oneOf.description: Mental/psychiatric claims + statutory presumption fields (firefighters, peace officers, healthcare).

predominant_cause_pct.description: CA LC §3208.3 — must be ≥51% to be compensable.

cancer_type_code.description: Specific cancer for firefighter presumption (per NFPA studies).

oneOf.description: Excess carrier notification triggers per claim.
Reopened claim details. Distinct from cross_references.

reconciliation_summary.description: Pass/fail summary across all reconciliation checks. Downstream consumers gate on this.

categories_failed.description: Categories with at least one failure: bucket_arithmetic, policy_total, claim_count, lae_inclusion, date_ordering

acord_message_type.description: If delivered via ACORD: ECOT, EBOT, GRLC version.

x-changes: ADD document.report_platform (Origami Risk, Riskonnect, Marsh ClearSight)
LOCK examiner shape (5 sibling fields, role enum)
x-changes-v5: ADD claims[].injury — body_part_code, nature_of_injury_code, cause_of_injury_code (WCIO 2-digit codes)
ADD claims[].dates — date_of_injury_begin/end, date_of_knowledge, date_of_diagnosis, mmi_date, return_to_work_date, etc.
ADD claims[].disability_rating (PD%, WPI, AMA Guides edition, apportionment)
ADD claims[].litigation (WCAB case#, settlement type, attorneys, judge)
ADD claims[].subrogation (tortfeasor, lien, gross/net recovery, MSP)
ADD claims[].medicare (Section 111 RRE, MSA amount, ORM, TPOC)
ADD claims[].provider (treating MD, MPN/HCN, UR, IMR, PPO savings)
ADD claims[].death_benefits (dependents[], burial, survivor weekly rate)
ADD claims[].excess_notification (50/75/100% notice dates, cat flag)
ADD claims[].reopening (petitioner, reason, prior settlement type)
ADD claims[].wage_benefits (AWW, TIBs/IIBs/SIBs/LIBs, RTW status, SJDB voucher)
ADD claims[].employer_relationship (PEO, co-employment, IC dispute, ABC test)
